description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image. Define two stages: test and deploy. Add a test job in the test stage that runs `gem install jekyll` then `jekyll build -d test`, stores the `test` directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs `gem install jekyll` then `jekyll build -d public`, publishes the `public` directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
